use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in modern web applications requiring a premium, metallic aesthetic
Interactive form submission buttons with multiple visual states (hover, active, focus, disabled)
Action triggers in dashboards, settings panels, and navigation bars needing visual hierarchy
Buttons in dark-themed interfaces where the metallic 'cool' variant provides depth and contrast
Reusable button component system supporting multiple variants via CVA for consistent theming
ai_summary: A sophisticated button component system featuring a 'cool' metallic variant with inset shadows, gradients, and glass-like ring effects for 3D depth. Built on Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, offering multiple visual variants (default, destructive, cool, outline, secondary, ghost, link) with responsive sizing options. The component includes hover brightness effects, focus-visible keyboard navigation states, and active press feedback, making it ideal for premium SaaS, fintech, and developer tool interfaces requiring polished, accessible interactive elements.
